## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Chore

## Related issue

Closes #

## How to test

Explain how reviewers can test this change.

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
npm run lint --if-present
npm run build --if-present
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the pull request focused and small.
- [ ] I updated documentation when needed.
- [ ] I tested the change locally.
- [ ] I did not commit private configuration files or private meeting data.
- [ ] I checked that the app still builds.

## Screenshots or demo

Add screenshots, videos or notes when the change affects the UI.
